title: Ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate frameworks
abstract: Disclosed are zeolitic imidazolate framework (ZIF) compositions in which at least a portion of the ligands in its shell have been exchanged with other ligands, and methods of making such shell-ligand-exchanged ZIFs. Also disclosed is the use of such shell-ligand-exchanged ZIFs in hydrocarbon separation processes.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. A method for making a shell-ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate framework composition, said method comprising the steps of: (a) providing a source of an initial zeolitic imidazolate framework composition having outermost layer of ligands of tetrahedral arrangement which comprise a general structure of M 1 - IM a -M 2 , wherein IM a is a initial imidazolate ligand and M 1 and M 2 comprise the same or different metal cations; (b) providing a source of a liquid composition comprising a IM b , wherein said IM b is an exchange imidazolate ligand which is different from said IM a ; and (c) contacting said initial zeolitic imidazolate framework composition with said liquid composition under conditions sufficient to produce a shell-ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate framework composition having outermost layer of ligands of tetrahedral arrangement which comprises a general structure of M'-IM a -IM b -M 2 . wherein said IM b comprises no more than 5 wt.%, based on the total weight of said shell-ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate framework composition. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein at least a portion of said outermost layer of ligands of IM a of said initial zeolitic imidazolate framework composition are exchanged with said IM b . 3. The method of claim 1 or claim 2, wherein at least 95% or more of said outermost layer of ligands are comprised of said IM b , based on the total weight of said shell-ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate framework composition. 4. The method of claim 1, wherein said initial zeolitic framework composition is ZIF-7 and said IM a comprises benzimidazolate. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein said initial zeolitic framework composition is ZIF-8 and said IM a comprises 2-methylimidazolate. 6. The method of claim 1, wherein said initial zeolitic framework structure is EMM-36 and IM a comprises a mixture of 4,5,6,7-tetrahydro-benzimidazolate and benzimidazolate. 7. The method of any preceding claim, wherein said IM b comprises any one of 2-methyl- imidazolate, 2-methylbenzimidazolate, 2-methyl-4,5,6,7-tetrahydrobenzimidazolate, and mixtures thereof. 8. The method of any preceding claim, wherein M 1 and M 2 are transition metals each independently selected from the group consisting of Sc, Ti, V, Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni, Cu, Y, Zr, Nb, Mo, Tc, Ru, Rh, Pd, Ag, Cd, Lu, Hf, Ta, W, Re, Os, Ir, Pt, Au, Hg, Lr, Rf, Db, Sg, Bh, Hs, Mt, Ds, Rg, Uub, Zn, and mixtures thereof. 9. The method of any preceding claim, wherein said contacting is in the presence of a solvent. 10. The method of claim 9, wherein said solvent is selected from the group consisting of ethanol, acetonitrile, N. A-di methyl formamide (DMF), and mixtures thereof. 11. A shell-ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate framework composition comprising said shell-ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate framework composition made by the method of any one of claims 1 to 10. 12. A shell-ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate framework composition comprising: a zeolitic imidazolate framework composition comprising ZIF-8 and having outermost layer of ligands of tetrahedral arrangement which comprises a general structure of M 1 -lM a -IM b -M 2 and no more than 5 wt.% of IM b , based on the total weight of said shell-ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate framework composition, wherein said: (i) IM a comprises 2-methylimidazolate, (ii) IM b comprises one or more of 2-methyl-imidazolate, 2-methylbenzimidazolate, or 2-methyl-4,5,6,7-tetrahydrobenzimidazolate, and (iii) M 1 and/or M 2 comprise Zn. 13. A shell-ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate framework composition comprising: a zeolitic imidazolate framework composition comprising ZIF-7 and having outermost layer of ligands of tetrahedral arrangement which comprises a general structure of M 1 -IM a -IM b -M 2 , and no more than 5 wt.% of IM b , based on the total weight of said shell-ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate framework composition, wherein said: (i) IM a comprises benzimidazolate, (ii) IM b comprises one or more of 2-methyl-imidazolate, 2-methylbenzimidazolate, or 2-methyl-4,5,6,7-tetrahydrobenzimidazolate, (iii) M 1 and/or M 2 comprises Zn. 14. A shell-ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate framework composition comprising: a zeolitic imidazolate framework composition comprising EMM-36 and having outermost layer of ligands of tetrahedral arrangement which comprises a general structure of M 1 -lM a -IM b -M 2 , and no more than 5 wt.% of IM b , based on the total weight of said shell-ligand-exchanged zeolitic imidazolate framework composition, wherein said: (i) IM a is a mixture of 4,5,6,7-tetrahydrobenzimidazolate and benzimidazolate, 

 (ii) IM b comprises one or more of 2-methyl-imidazolate, 2-methylbenzimidazolate, or 2-methyl-4,5,6,7-tetrahydrobenzimidazolate, and (iii) M 1 and said M 2 are both Zn. 15. A process for separating a hydrocarbon stream, the process comprising the steps of: (a) providing a hydrocarbon stream comprising a first hydrocarbon mixture and a second hydrocarbon mixture; (b) providing a stream comprising a source of a shell-bgand-exchanged zeobtic imidazolate framework composition corresponding to any one of claims 11 to 14; (c) contacting said hydrocarbon stream and said stream comprising said source of said shell-bgand-exchanged zeobtic imidazolate framework composition under suitable conditions to separate at least a portion of said first hydrocarbon mixture from said second hydrocarbon mixture. 16. The process of claim 15, wherein said first hydrocarbon mixture comprises linear hydrocarbon paraffins and said second hydrocarbon mixture comprises branched hydrocarbon paraffins.
